content: Pet marketplace platforms are multi-module systems with: customer commerce (product catalog, cart, checkout), service booking, vendor/provider management, customer engagement. Bhaw Bhaw case study shows modular architecture with centralized data. PetVerse (React/Node) shows role-based access: Pet Owners, Sellers, Service Providers, Admin. Key pet-specific data: breed, vaccination status, age, gender, microchip info, health records. Trust architecture essential: seller verification, moderation, fraud reporting, reviews with abuse detection.
